message:
fix: propagate IO errors in auth file locking + clippy const fix

- auth.rs: lock_file/lock_file_async now return IO errors immediately
  instead of silently retrying until timeout. Only retries on Ok(false)
  (lock held by another process). Prevents misleading "Timed out" errors
  when the real issue is permissions or file corruption.
- providers/anthropic.rs: add const to recompute_total_tokens per clippy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
